response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, including some high-throughput work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the role demands Principal-level (IC6) leadership in experimentation and growth systems, and the resume shows no experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis workflows. There is also no evidence of multi-team, multi-workstream technical leadership at the scope this role requires; the trajectory is that of a strong senior/staff generalist rather than a principal-level experimentation systems architect.
strengths: Broad, hands-on engineering experience across many stacks (TypeScript/Node, D, C/C++, Java) with strong testing/TDD craftsmanship
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby media
Recent AI-tooling exposure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth-measurement platform experience anywhere in the resume
No demonstrated principal-level scope: no evidence of architecting systems used across multiple teams or leading multi-workstream initiatives
Limited telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background relative to the role's high data-aptitude bar

key_factors.factor: Scope gap between senior IC background and Principal/IC6 expectations
Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale systems exposure
